growth_records.strain: in situ community, Římov reservoir hypolimnion, 25 m depth
growth_records.cite: Šimek et al. New lineage of scuticociliates dominates the ciliate community and bacterivory in hypolimnetic waters of a freshwater reservoir. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf148. [PMC12366787]
growth_records.snippet: It ranged from 0.116 to 0.136 day−1, yielding doubling times of 122 and 144 hours (Table 1). ... 11 August, 2023 | 0.136 ± 0.008 | 122 ± 7.5
growth_records.notes: Reported (Table 1) prokaryotic max growth rate 0.136 ± 0.008 day−1 and doubling time 122 ± 7.5 h on 11 Aug 2023, in situ 5.8°C. Converted growth_rate to per-h: 0.136 day−1 / 24 h = 0.005667 h−1. Consistency check: ln2/0.005667 = 122.3 h ≈ reported 122 h. Natural mixed community; no defined medium composition (in-situ reservoir water). No substrate uptake or product secretion fluxes reported.

growth_records.strain: in situ community, Římov reservoir hypolimnion, 25 m depth
growth_records.cite: Šimek et al. New lineage of scuticociliates dominates the ciliate community and bacterivory in hypolimnetic waters of a freshwater reservoir. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf148. [PMC12366787]
growth_records.snippet: It ranged from 0.116 to 0.136 day−1, yielding doubling times of 122 and 144 hours (Table 1). ... 25 August, 2023 | 0.116 ± 0.002 | 144 ± 2.0
growth_records.notes: Reported (Table 1) prokaryotic max growth rate 0.116 ± 0.002 day−1 and doubling time 144 ± 2.0 h on 25 Aug 2023, in situ 5.8°C. Converted growth_rate to per-h: 0.116 day−1 / 24 h = 0.004833 h−1. Consistency check: ln2/0.004833 = 143.4 h ≈ reported 144 h. Natural mixed community; no defined medium composition (in-situ reservoir water). No substrate uptake or product secretion fluxes reported. NOTE: 62.5%/73.8% of daily prokaryotic production removed by protists (grazing loss, not a metabolic flux) - not captured as uptake/secretion.
